user_intent_preservation.functional_behavior: Generate 3-phase center-aligned PWM on GTM.TOM1 Cluster_1 with 3 complementary pairs (U, V, W), 1 us rising/falling dead time, synchronous start and synchronous duty updates. Initial duties U/V/W = 25/50/75% with 10% step and wrap to 0% when reaching 100%. Provide a GTM enable guard (skip GTM/CMU re-init if GTM is already enabled). Add a GTM ATOM periodic ISR on CPU0, priority 20, toggling P13.0 every 500 ms and provide an empty IfxGtm_periodEventFunction. Expose functions initGtmTom3phInv(void) and updateGtmTom3phInvDuty(void); main loop calls init once, then periodically calls updateGtmTom3phInvDuty() with ~500 ms delay using STM ticks.
user_intent_preservation.technical_approach: Upgrade from IfxGtm_Tom_PwmHl to the unified IfxGtm_Pwm driver for PWM generation on TOM1 Cluster_1. Use IfxGtm_Pwm_initConfig/IfxGtm_Pwm_initChannelConfig/IfxGtm_Pwm_init to configure 6 TOM channels as 3 complementary pairs with center-aligned mode and 1 us dead time. Set GTM enable guard via IfxGtm_isEnabled/IfxGtm_enable. Configure TOUT pins for P02.0/P02.7, P02.1/P02.4, P02.2/P02.5 using IfxGtm_PinMap_setTomTout with pushPull and cmosAutomotiveSpeed1. Start channels synchronously with IfxGtm_Pwm_startSyncedChannels and update all three phase duties atomically with IfxGtm_Pwm_updateChannelsDutyImmediate. Add a GTM ATOM periodic timer/ISR using IfxGtm_Atom_Timer (acknowledgeTimerIrq in ISR), install ISR with IfxCpu_Irq_installInterruptHandler and enable the corresponding SRC with IfxSrc_enable; ISR toggles P13.0 and calls IfxGtm_periodEventFunction().

driver_selection.selection_rationale: User explicitly requested an upgrade from IfxGtm_Tom_PwmHl to the unified high-level IfxGtm_Pwm. This driver natively supports center-aligned PWM, synchronous start/update across multiple channels, complementary pairs, and run-time updates for dead time and frequency. It is available in the template and provides the exact APIs needed for multi-channel duty updates.

runtime_function.name: updateGtmTom3phInvDuty
runtime_function.purpose: Applies the stepped duty-cycle pattern (U/V/W percent with 10% step and wrap) to all three phases atomically for synchronous inverter update.

api_changes.to: Mode configured via IfxGtm_Pwm_init(...) center-aligned/complementary/dead-time fields

migration_notes.context_preserved: The solution keeps TOM1 Cluster_1, center-aligned mode, three complementary pairs with 1 us dead time, synchronous start and duty update, and maintains the same user-facing functions initGtmTom3phInv() and updateGtmTom3phInvDuty(). Pin configuration remains on P02.0/2.7, P02.1/2.4, P02.2/2.5 using the GTM TOM TOUT pin map. A GTM enable guard is implemented using IfxGtm_isEnabled/IfxGtm_enable. An ATOM periodic ISR is added per requirement, with CPU0 priority 20, toggling P13.0. The main loop pattern from the reference is preserved.

PWM.rationale: Driver locked by refiner node (user explicit or engine-scored)
